title: anisocarpus pumilus
intro: Anisocarpus pumilus, also known as the dwarf flax, is a rare and small-flowered plant native to the western regions of North America. The plant's roots and stems contain saponins, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anisocarpus pumilus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be made by drying and processing the roots and stems.
